skill_wirings.short_description: Orient within the sibling workspace and pick the strongest owner surface before deeper work.
skill_wirings.default_prompt: Use this route to orient within the AoA workspace, map the owning repository and strongest source surfaces, and hand off only after route clarity is explicit.
skill_wirings.notes: Good first move when the task is fuzzy, cross-repo, or owner-fit is unclear.

skill_wirings.short_description: Inspect derived views and evidence-linked summaries without turning stats into proof authority.
skill_wirings.default_prompt: Use this route to inspect AoA summary surfaces, derived windows, and evidence-linked observability views after workspace orientation has named the strongest path.
skill_wirings.notes: Use when the route needs active summary surfaces or evidence-linked counts.

skill_wirings.short_description: Follow manifest-first seed order, staging context, and planting lineage without mistaking staging for owner truth.
skill_wirings.default_prompt: Use this route to navigate Dionysus through manifest -> seed -> closure -> registry -> planting protocol, then return to the owning repository before making meaning claims.
skill_wirings.notes: Use when the route involves open waves, seed staging, planting trace, or owner handoff.
